title: geranium cinereum subsp. lazicum
intro: Geranium cinereum subsp. lazicum is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geranium genus and is native to the Black Sea region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Geranium cinereum subsp. lazicum include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and in some cases, the essential oil is used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
